title: derris piscatoria
intro: Derris piscatoria, also known as Neptunia oleracea, is a plant species in the family Fabaceae, native to tropical Asia and the Pacific Islands. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which contain rotenone, a natural insecticide. The leaves and roots of the Derris piscatoria plant have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to their anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Derris piscatoria include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to support overall health and well-being.
